# Basic HelloWorld server test with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive timeouts for rapid testing
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1500ms
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=800ms

# Start the server with aggressive timeout
exec timeout 8s go run . &
wait 150ms

# Test basic greeting with default parameters
cat > basic_greeting.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<basic_greeting.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, World!'

# Test greeting with custom name
cat > custom_name.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Alice"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<custom_name.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, Alice!'

# Test fortune
cat > fortune_request.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "fortune",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<fortune_request.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'tree|future|journey|success|started|innovation|life|dream|moment|think'

# Test list languages
cat > list_languages.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "list_languages",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<list_languages.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Supported languages'
stdout 'english'
stdout 'spanish'
stdout 'french'

# Test greeting with fortune
cat > greeting_fortune.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 5,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting_with_fortune",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Bob"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<greeting_fortune.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, Bob!'
stdout 'Your fortune:'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f basic_greeting.json custom_name.json fortune_request.json list_languages.json greeting_fortune.json
